rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Project memory is stored at `.kody/memory.md` and injected into taskify via the `{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}` block in `prompts/taskify-ticket.md`.","scope":"kody engine"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The file tree is generated using `git ls-files` (not `find` or tree walkers) and injected alongside project memory into the PROJECT_CONTEXT block.","scope":"kody engine"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Verification-only tasks use task.md to document the expected behavior and confirm it already works, requiring no code changes.","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
